title: Zorbit Demo Segment
description: Schema for demo and training segments. Supports interactive step-by-step walkthroughs and pre-recorded video segments.

id.description: Unique demo segment identifier using short hash format.

title.description: Display title for the demo segment.

description.description: Brief description of what this demo segment covers.
examples: Learn how to log in and navigate the dashboard.

type.description: Segment type. Interactive segments execute steps in the browser. Video segments play a pre-recorded video.

builtin.description: Whether this is a built-in segment. Built-in segments are read-only and can be duplicated but not edited or deleted.

category.description: Category for grouping and filtering segments.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps for interactive-type segments.

video_url.description: Video URL for video-type segments. Supports direct MP4/WebM URLs, YouTube embeds, and Loom embeds.

tts_enabled.description: Whether text-to-speech narration is enabled for interactive steps.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the segment was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.

action.description: Step action type. info=display message, navigate=change route, type=enter text, click=click element, highlight=highlight element, scroll=scroll to element, wait=pause.

target.description: CSS selector or route path for the action target.

value.description: Value for the action. Text to type, info message to display, scroll position, etc.
examples: Click the login button to proceed.

delay_ms.description: Delay in milliseconds before executing this step or wait duration for wait actions.

narration.description: Text-to-speech narration for this step. Read aloud when TTS is enabled.
examples: Now let's click the login button.
Enter your email address in the field.
